summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PropValu real estate valuation platform. Backend APIs 90% successful, frontend UI and form flow working excellently. AI report generation timeout is the main issue.

critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot get AI-generated reports, affects core feature

integration_issues.issue: Some report pages show 'Cargando valuación...' indefinitely due to backend LLM timeout

passed_tests: Landing page loads with green institutional colors (#1B4332, #52B788, #D9ED92)
3-step valuation form (Ubicación, Características, Detalles) fully functional
Form validation working for required fields
Create valuation API (200) - creates valuation successfully
Generate comparables API (200) - MOCKED API generates 6-10 realistic comparables
Calculate valuation API (200) - proper calculation with confidence levels
Full flow: form → API → report page navigation successful
Report displays valuation results with monetary values
UI design matches institutional green color scheme
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix LLM integration timeout issue in generate-report endpoint. The emergent integrations LLM call is timing out after 30+ seconds, preventing AI report generation. Check EMERGENT_LLM_KEY validity and LLM service connectivity.
